name: Rice and Sausage Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 1 1/2 lb Mild Italian sausage, casing removed, meat crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine rice, broth, sage, thyme and rosemary in a large bowl. Cover and bring to a boil over medium heat.
2 Reduce heat to low and cook without stirring until the liquid is absorbed, about 15 minutes.
3 Cook sausage on medium heat, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned.
4 Add raisins to the meat, stirring often, until they puff up.
5 Remove the meat and raisins with a slotted spoon and add them to the rice mixture.
6 Add greens to the sausage drippings and cook, stirring frequently, until the leaves are wilted and bright green, about 8 minutes.
7 Add the greens, drippings, and Parmesan cheese to the rice. Mix well.
8 This can be prepared up to 24 hours in advance and kept chilled prior to stuffing a 10-12 pound bird.
